Disable kitty close confirmation dialog

Set confirm_os_window_close = 0 to skip the 'Are you sure you want to
close this OS Window?' prompt.
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Disable kitty close confirmation dialog" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Set `confirm_os_window_close = 0` in kitty settings to suppress the "Are you sure you want to close this OS Window?" confirmation prompt

## Test plan
- [x] `nix flake check --no-build` passes
- [ ] Verify kitty no longer shows close confirmation on workstation

Run: 20260317-0736-542c
EOF
)"

content.text:
PR created: https://github.com/patflynn/cosmo/pull/353

The change adds `confirm_os_window_close = 0` to the kitty settings in `home/workstation.nix`, which disables the close confirmation dialog. Flake check and pre-commit hooks both pass.
